label: Kandinsky v2.2
system_gap: no public runnable job contract is admitted yet

risk_interpretation.zh-CN: Kandinsky v2.2 黑盒审计尚未产生已接纳的运行结果。当前仅完成合同注册，暂无可用风险量化数据。
risk_interpretation.en-US: Kandinsky v2.2 black-box audit has not yet produced admitted results. The contract is registered; risk quantification data is not yet available.

label: Stable Diffusion 1.5 + DDIM
system_gap: runtime contract is live; remaining gap is to surface semantic limits and secondary-track boundaries cleanly in platform copy

risk_interpretation.zh-CN: Recon 攻击在 Stable Diffusion 1.5 + DDIM 上达到 AUC 0.849、ASR 0.51、TPR@1% 1.0，风险等级为高。攻击者仅凭 100 个公开样本即可重建训练数据特征，表明模型存在明显的成员隐私泄露风险。建议采用差分隐私训练降低泄露风险。
risk_interpretation.en-US: Recon attack achieves AUC 0.849, ASR 0.51, TPR@1% 1.0 on Stable Diffusion 1.5 + DDIM — risk level: high. With only 100 public samples, the attacker can reconstruct training data features, indicating clear membership privacy leakage. Differential privacy training is recommended.

label: PIA on CIFAR10 DDPM
system_gap: gray-box attack and provisional defense are admitted; remaining gap is to expose cost columns and defense wording consistently across system views

risk_interpretation.zh-CN: PIA 灰盒攻击基线 AUC 0.841、ASR 0.786，风险等级为高。采用 stochastic-dropout (all_steps) 防御后 AUC 降至 0.828、ASR 降至 0.768，降幅 1.3%（AUC）和 1.8%（ASR）。防御有效果但幅度有限，残余风险仍处于高等级，建议结合更强的隐私保护机制。
risk_interpretation.en-US: PIA gray-box attack baseline AUC 0.841, ASR 0.786 — risk level: high. With stochastic-dropout (all_steps) defense, AUC drops to 0.828 (−1.3%) and ASR to 0.768 (−1.8%). The defense shows measurable but limited effect; residual risk remains high. Stronger privacy mechanisms are recommended.

label: GSA on DDPM CIFAR10
system_gap: white-box rerun has produced a stronger admitted attack result; remaining gap is to bridge W-1 into a same-protocol benchmark without overstating benchmark completeness

risk_interpretation.zh-CN: GSA 白盒攻击基线 AUC 0.998、ASR 0.990，风险等级为极高。攻击者拥有完整模型访问权限时，几乎可以确定每条训练数据的成员身份。采用 W-1 强防御后 AUC 降至 0.489、ASR 降至 0.499，接近随机猜测水平（AUC 0.5），风险等级降至低。白盒场景下强防御可将风险有效消除。
risk_interpretation.en-US: GSA white-box attack baseline AUC 0.998, ASR 0.990 — risk level: critical. With full model access, the attacker can almost certainly determine membership of each training sample. With W-1 strong defense, AUC drops to 0.489 and ASR to 0.499 — near random guessing (AUC 0.5) — risk level: low. Strong defense effectively eliminates risk in white-box scenarios.
